lines.text: Relax at the Luna Park Pool plus 2 leisure pools amid the elegance of turn-of-the-century Atlantic City.

From January 11, 2027, through April 2027, the Luna Park Pool, the Luna Park Crazy Play Area and Leaping Horse Libations at Disney’s BoardWalk Inn and Disney’s BoardWalk Villas will be closed for routine maintenance. Guests may see and hear work taking place during daytime hours. However, the Villas Pool and the Inn Pool will remain open for Guests to enjoy.

Swim in this carnival-themed pool that is home to a 200-foot-long waterslide. Make a splash in a 184,217-gallon pool inspired by a 1920s amusement park. Adults can enjoy the serenity of the whirlpool spa while little ones will surely want to splash it up in the kiddie pool.
Plus, be sure to stop by the nearby Leaping Horse Libations for tasty sandwiches, refreshing beverages and so much more.

Guests seeking a tranquil swimming experience can choose from 2 leisure pools. One is located south of Luna Park Pool and the other is located on the east side of the Resort hotel. Both feature whirlpool spas for additional relaxation.

Let’s make a splash at Luna Park Pool! Join us for family-friendly activities each day, like themed pool parties and other cool activities. Fun offerings include themed pool games, relays, trivia and more! See a Recreation Host for additional details.
Hours and lifeguard availability vary by pool and are subject to change.
Complimentary towels are provided at all pools.
